Class ShopRoom

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.dongeon.ShopRoom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Room
public final class ShopRoom extends Object implements Room
Represents a shop in the dungeon. The hero can buy items here with gold or sell items from their backpack.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    ShopRoom(Coordinate coordRoom, int levelHero)
    Creates a shop room.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShopRoom

      public ShopRoom(Coordinate coordRoom, int levelHero)
      Creates a shop room.
      Parameters:
      coordRoom - the location of the room.
      levelHero - the level of the hero (for item generation).

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public Item getItem(Coordinate coordinate)
      Gets an item from the shop shelf.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - the position of the item in the shop.
      Returns:
      the item or null.

    • isStockGenerated

      public boolean isStockGenerated()
      Checks if the shop has items.
      Returns:
      true if the shop is not empty.

    • get

      public Item get()

    • generateMerchantStock

      public void generateMerchantStock()
      Fills the shop with random items. It uses the hero level to choose the items.

    • buyItem

      public Hero buyItem(Hero hero, Coordinate coordinateItem, Coordinate coordinateBP)
      Tries to buy an item from the shop. It checks if the hero has enough gold.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero buying the item.
      coordinateItem - the location of the item in the shop.
      coordinateBP - the location in the backpack to put the item.
      Returns:
      the updated hero.

    • sellItem

      public boolean sellItem(Hero hero, Coordinate coordinateBP)
      Sells an item from the hero's backpack.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero selling the item.
      coordinateBP - the location of the item in the backpack.
      Returns:
      true if the sale was successful.

    • coordRoom

      public Coordinate coordRoom()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the coordinates of the room on the map.
      Specified by:
      coordRoom in interface Room
      Returns:
      the coordinate.

    • getSymbol

      public String getSymbol()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the symbol used to draw the room.
      Specified by:
      getSymbol in interface Room
      Returns:
      a string symbol (like "S" or "T").

    • getType

      public TypeRoom getType()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the type of the room.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      the TypeRoom enum.
